name: Qx Bing Wallpaper
description: Browse Bing's daily images in a native Qx Gallery, then download or set them as wallpaper.
author: Qx

preferences.label: Apply Wallpaper To
preferences.description: macOS: apply to every desktop or only the current desktop.

preferences.label: Download Directory
preferences.description: Folder used by the Download action.

commands.name: open-gallery
commands.title: Qx Bing Wallpaper
commands.description: Browse Bing daily wallpapers in the Qx Gallery.

commands.name: set-random-wallpaper
commands.title: Set Random Bing Wallpaper
commands.description: Set a random recent Bing wallpaper once per day.

commands.name: set-latest-wallpaper
commands.title: Set Latest Bing Wallpaper
commands.description: Set the latest Bing wallpaper once per day.
